main.name: Wichayut Laorod
main.description: A highly motivated Software Engineering graduate with experience collaborating with companies as part of coursework since sophomore year and completing a cooperative education program in the final year. Proficient in front-end development, specializing in React.js, with a solid understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies. Strong adaptability, teamwork skills, and the ability to thrive in dynamic environments.

aboutMe.name: Wichayut Laorod

intro.line1: Hello! I'm a Front-end and Full-stack developer who recently graduated with a bachelor's degree and am eager to start my career in the tech industry.
intro.line2: During my studies, I learned and developed skills to create user-friendly and visually appealing websites and applications using modern technologies like React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
intro.line3: I believe good design and simple functionality can provide a great user experience, and that's what I strive to achieve in every project I work on.
